name: Guerrieri, Cox & Associates, LLC
description_short: Columbus-based bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing services with 20+ years of combined attorney experience.
description_long:
Guerrieri, Cox & Associates, LLC was founded in 2003 by attorneys who left a larger firm to provide more personalized client service in the bankruptcy and debt relief space. The founders were dissatisfied with a previous employer's transactional approach to clients and created this practice to offer thoughtful, strategic representation to individuals seeking debt relief in Central Ohio. The firm is located in Clintonville, Columbus, and serves the greater Central Ohio region.

The firm specializes in bankruptcy relief under the U.S. Bankruptcy Code, helping clients file for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 protection. They offer free case evaluations and provide guidance on how to preserve assets, minimize payments, and achieve a financial fresh start. Their stated approach emphasizes understanding each client's unique circumstances before recommending a debt relief strategy. They also offer telephone consultation options to accommodate client needs.

What distinguishes Guerrieri, Cox & Associates is their stated commitment to authentic client service and their origin story—the founders explicitly chose to leave a sales-focused environment to practice law as a calling rather than a business. The firm highlights over 30 years of combined experience and promises faithfulness, competence, and diligence. They position themselves around relationship-based service rather than volume-based processing.

The firm operates as a legitimate bankruptcy law practice with a professional website, clear contact information, and a physical office location. However, prospective clients should understand that bankruptcy is a serious legal proceeding with lasting credit consequences, and while the firm promises personalized service, individual results depend heavily on the client's financial situation, income, assets, and local bankruptcy court practices. No independent reviews or third-party verification of their claims are available from the website alone.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Founded in 2003 with 20+ years of combined attorney experience in bankruptcy law
Free case evaluation offered to assess individual debt relief options
Explicitly emphasizes personalized service and taking time to understand each client's circumstances
Physical office location in Clintonville with free parking available
Telephone appointment options available for client convenience
Stated commitment to helping clients keep maximum property while minimizing payments
cons: No independent reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible on their website or via the provided content
Website does not specify fee structure, retainer costs, or transparent pricing for bankruptcy filing services
No information about attorney credentials, bar standing, or disciplinary history provided on the website
Limited details on post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding support or long-term client guidance
Bankruptcy has severe long-term credit consequences (7-10 year reporting period) that the firm does not heavily emphasize
best_for: Central Ohio residents with significant debt seeking Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy protection
Individuals wanting personalized attorney consultation before deciding whether bankruptcy is appropriate
People who prefer local, relationship-based legal service over high-volume bankruptcy mills
diagnosis: Guerrieri, Cox & Associates is best for Central Ohio residents who are seriously considering bankruptcy protection and value personalized attorney attention. The main caveat is that bankruptcy is a last-resort legal option with severe 7-10 year credit consequences; it should only be pursued after exploring other debt relief alternatives, and prospective clients should independently verify attorney credentials and fee structures before engaging.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
